title: Starlight Screens
description: Midnight? In my GUI? More likely than you think.
body:
Starlight Screens will decorate your interface with a dark blue/purple theme, with little stars at the corners!
It should give the feel of midnight through the colors, stars and the occasional moon!

I have been doing other projects, so I don't think I'll have time to finish this. Please use [Darkomizer](https://darkomizer.com/) and set these colors (Main: 0A041E, Border: 3600FF). This should cover the remaining textures.
